channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Reviewing US Peace Proposal as Both Sides Edge Toward Deal
item.description: Iran is reviewing a one-page US proposal that could end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, requiring Tehran to suspend nuclear enrichment while Washington releases billions in frozen assets. The White House awaits Tehran's response as diplomatic momentum builds.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Expands Influence Across Asia as Iran War Creates Energy Crisis
item.description: The Iran war has left China's neighbors appealing for energy help, handing Beijing the regional sway it has long sought. Countries across Asia are turning to China as fuel shortages bite.

item.title: 🇹🇼 US Massing Troops Near Taiwan to Deter Chinese Aggression
item.description: America is building up military forces near Taiwan as a deterrent against potential Chinese adventurism during the Iran crisis. The deployment signals US commitment to the Indo-Pacific despite Middle East demands.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Russian Drone Attacks Spill Into NATO Territory in Romania
item.description: Four years of war in Ukraine is taking a toll on neighboring Romania as Russian drones repeatedly cross into NATO territory. Residents live with the constant threat of weapons of war entering their airspace.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Private Payrolls Post Largest Gain in 15 Months Despite Middle East Uncertainty
item.description: US private payrolls rose significantly in April, pointing to continued labor market stability even as the Iran conflict clouds the economic outlook. The data suggests resilience in the American economy.

item.title: 🛢️ US fires on Iranian oil tanker amid war pressure
item.description: US military forces fired on an Iranian oil tanker as the Trump administration continues to pressure Tehran for a deal to end the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇺🇸 Japan's Trump Supporters Lose Faith Amid Iran War Chaos
item.description: Longtime Japanese supporters of Trump are questioning their allegiance as Iran war disruptions and troop withdrawal plans raise concerns about US-Japan security ties.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇮🇷 India Sidelined by Iran War as Regional Diplomacy Unravels
item.description: The Iran-Israel conflict has undermined New Delhi's delicate balancing act in the Middle East, leaving India without leverage as major powers reshape regional dynamics.

item.title: 🇹🇼💾 Taiwan's Silicon Shield Exposed by Hormuz Crisis
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz disruption reveals vulnerabilities in Taiwan's economic power, as its technology sector depends on stable global supply chains now under threat.

item.title: 🇲🇱🇷🇺 Russian Commander Claims Western Funding for Mali Militants
item.description: A Russian Africa Corps helicopter commander claims illegal armed groups attempting a coup in Mali receive Western funding, amid ongoing instability in the Sahel.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: Israel struck Beirut for the first time since agreeing to a ceasefire with Hezbollah, targeting a commander of the militant group's elite Radwan force in the city's southern suburbs.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea declares it is not bound by nuclear non-proliferation treaty
item.description: North Korea stated it is not bound by any treaty on non-proliferation of nuclear weapons, as state media KCNA reported Pyongyang continues to reject international pressure and sanctions to dismantle its nuclear program.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea revises constitution to drop reunification references
item.description: North Korea has revised its constitution to define its territory as bordering South Korea and remove references to reunification, codifying leader Kim Jong Un's push to treat the two Koreas as separate states.

item.title: ⛪ Rubio to meet Pope Leo as Trump continues attacks on pontiff
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will meet Pope Leo at the Vatican, in a potentially fraught encounter as President Donald Trump has continued disparaging attacks on the Catholic leader over the Iran war.

item.title: 📺 Ted Turner, CNN Founder and Media Pioneer, Dies at 87
item.description: The billionaire media mogul who revolutionized cable news with the launch of CNN in 1980 has died. Turner also owned the Atlanta Braves and was a champion yachtsman, leaving an indelible mark on both media and sports.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Deploys Aircraft Carrier Toward Strait of Hormuz
item.description: France moved its Charles de Gaulle carrier strike group to the Red Sea in preparation for a potential mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz. The move comes as Washington and Tehran negotiate a possible peace deal.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Nikkei Hits Record High Above 62,000 on Middle East Peace Hopes
item.description: Japans benchmark Nikkei 225 surged past 62,000 for the first time ever, driven by strong tech earnings and growing optimism about a potential US-Iran peace deal. Asian stocks broadly rallied on the news.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela Rejects ICJ Jurisdiction in Guyana Oil Territory Dispute
item.description: Venezuela told the UN International Court of Justice it has no jurisdiction over its century-old dispute with Guyana concerning the oil-rich Essequibo region. Venezuela claims the territory was fraudulently taken in the colonial era.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Rate Hike Chances Rise Amid Inflation Pressures
item.description: European Central Bank board member Piero Cipollone said the probability of an ECB rate hike has increased as inflation pressures remain elevated. The Iran war has complicated the global easing cycle.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Counterterrorism Strategy Adds Offensive Cyber Operations
item.description: The Trump administration unveiled a new counterterrorism strategy that includes offensive cyber operations against groups deemed threats to US interests, marking a significant expansion of American counterterrorism tools.

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon AI Adoption Gives Cyber Criminals Nation-State Powers
item.description: Pentagon leaders praise agentic AI tools that compress weeks of work into hours, but security experts warn the same tools are giving cyber criminals capabilities previously reserved for nation-states.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Trump Counterterrorism Strategy Brands Europe Terrorism Incubator
item.description: The new US counterterrorism strategy accuses Europe of fostering terrorism through mass migration while expanding domestic focus beyond Islamic extremism to include other threats.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Nikkei Surges Past 61,000 on Iran Deal Optimism
item.description: Japanese stocks hit a record high as markets reopened after holidays, with optimism growing around a potential US-Iran agreement to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran reviews US peace proposal as Trump signals war may be ending
item.description: Iran is reviewing a US peace proposal that would formally end the war, though key American demands on Iran's nuclear program and reopening the Strait of Hormuz remain unaddressed.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine accuses Russia of violating ceasefire proposed by Kyiv
item.description: President Zelenskiy says Russia carried out dozens of assaults, air strikes and drone attacks, demonstrating Moscow's "obvious spurning" of peace efforts.
